product.name: Lindab Magestic Round Galvanised Steel Gutter Union
product.description: This self-sealing gutter joint has been designed with a simple click and lock mechanism for a quick and easy installation and can be used to connect your gutters or gutter angles together. With a built-in EPDM rubber gasket, this gutter union does not require any sealant or screws, ensuring a clean installation and appearance with watertight joints.Available in a range of diameters to fit your Magestic gutter system, this gutter union is manufactured from galvanised steel with a strengthening magnesium zinc alloy coating which provides the greatest surface protection for coated steel surfaces. Providing superior galvanisation with magnesium with a stable barrier against corrosion problems, this gutter union has protective properties to preserve the porous structure of zinc. Demonstrating more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of standard zinc galvanised steel without magnesium when salt spray tested, this gutter union has improved edge protection with the galvanised coating which has self-healing properties that migrate to repair red rust on scratches and cuts.Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Round Galvanised Steel Gutter UnionRange of diameters available  Improved performance in coastal environments  Not influenced by the chlorine content of an environment  Advanced surface protection with magnesium zinc alloy galvanised steel  Cost-effective and affordable  Minimal environmental impact with reduced consumption of zinc resources  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Naturally weathers to a dark grey metallic appearance  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Quick and easy to install with click and lock mechanism  This gutter union ages superbly, settling into an attractive dark grey metallic appearance after 3-5 years from installation. With over three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanised steel in marine environments, this gutter union has the greatest resistance when enduring aggressive environments. This gutter join is suitable for a variety of buildings including small or large, contemporary or classic buildings.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Shoe
product.description:
This Lindab steel Round downpipe shoe comes available in multiple diameters to suit your downpipe systems. By joining at the bottom of the downpipe, it discharges rainwater to the drain. The socketed end easily fits onto the downpipe and makes installation incredibly simple.From the Magestic range, this downpipe shoe is made of galvanised steel. The magnesium zinc alloy makes for commendable resistance to corrosion and features self-healing properties that restore rust and scratches. This downpipe shoe has been tested to hold up in coastal and marine environments with salt spray to relevant International Standards (ISO 9227).

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Rod Access Pipe
product.description:
Ideal for providing access for a maintenance rod to remove pipe blockages, this access pipe is supplied as a 1-metre length with double spigot male ends, with the second spigot that can be removed if not needed. Fabricated from unpainted galvanised steel, this downpipe matures naturally to a lovely dark grey metallic exterior within 3 to 5 years after installation. Strengthened with an innovative magnesium zinc alloy coating, this steel access pipe has ultimate surface protection with over 20 times the corrosion resistance when salt spray tested and 3 times the endurance in marine environments than regular zinc galvanised steel.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Sliding Downpipe
product.description: Designed for use alongside an RT drain trap, this steel Round sliding downpipe is installed around the pipe and seamlessly slides to allow for access. By doing so, there is room for the system to undergo any necessary maintenance.Manufactured from sturdy galvanised steel, Lindab coats its Magestic rainwater range in a protective layer of magnesium zinc alloy. This makes for a resilient selection of guttering and fittings that are saltwater tested (ISO 9227), around 20 times more corrosion resistant than regular galvanised zinc, and the reduced zinc makes them more environmentally friendly. product.name: Lindab Magestic Rectangular Galvanised Steel Drain Shoe
product.description: This steel Round drain shoe has been strategically constructed by Lindab to attach a downpipe to a ground-level drain pipe, in turn filling the gap between them. The drain shoe is designed to be slightly bigger than the downpipe to allow for maintenance. Galvanised with a coating of magnesium zinc alloy, this Round drain shoe is a member of the high-quality Magestic range by Lindab. This means that it is highly resistant to the effects of corrosion and rust. If purchased, your drain shoe will provide you with longevity use, even in coastal and marine areas - all Magestic products are tested to International Standards (ISO 9227) and possess a striking ability to fight off distortion caused by saltwater. product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel 70dg Downpipe Bend
product.description:
With a steel structure that is galvanised with magnesium zinc alloy, this downpipe bend creates 70 offsets. Installation is straightforward with the socket design for male/female connections so that your downpipe bend can fit into your systems seamlessly.Salt water tested to International Standards (ISO 9227), the Magestic range from Lindab is proven to withstand even coastal environments. The magnesium zinc alloy migrates to self-repair any rusting and abrasions, and the durable nature ensures that your downpipe bend will last as long as possible.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Rectangular Galvanised Steel Intermediate Downpipe
product.description: This intermediate pipe easily cuts into suitable pieces for your required lengths. Typically used to make an offset with less than 100mm projection, this downpipe can be cut to make two short pipes. The 1m length option is supplied with double spigot male ends while the 0.5m downpipe is supplied with male/female ends.This downpipe is available in a range of diameters to fit your Magestic round downpipes. Made from galvanised steel, this downpipe has a strengthening magnesium zinc alloy coating which provides the highest surface protection for coated steel surfaces. Ageing superbly, this downpipe settles into an attractive dark grey metallic exterior after 3-5 years from installation. Providing elite galvanisation with magnesium, this downpipe has a stable barrier against corrosion issues and protects the porous structure of zinc. This downpipe demonstrates more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of standard zinc galvanised steel without magnesium when salt spray tested.  Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Rectangular Galvanised Steel Intermediate DownpipeAvailable in a range of lengths and diameters to fit your Magestic round downpipes  Not influenced by the chlorine content of an environment  Affordable and cost-effective  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Made to last with minimal thermal movement  Easy and quick to install  Weathers naturally to a dark grey metallic surface  Low environmental impact with reduced consumption of zinc resources  Superior surface protection with magnesium zinc alloy  Improved performance in coastal environmentsWith improved edge protection from the galvanised coating, this downpipe has self-healing qualities and migrates to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Over three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanised steel in marine environments, this downpipe has the ultimate resistance when facing aggressive environments. This downpipe is ideal for domestic or commercial, traditional or modern properties.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Offset
product.description: For avoiding a plinth or connecting a wall-mounted downpipe to a guttering outlet, this Round downpipe offset is innovatively manufactured by Lindab. From the Magestic galvanised rainwater system, this quality product is made from unpainted galvanised steel. Coated with a hardwearing magnesium zinc alloy, the Magestic range is highly protective as well as highly adverse to rusting and corrosion, cracking, and poor ageing. It holds up well even in marine or coastal environments and has been tested against salt spray to International Standards (ISO 9227). While being efficient and durable, this offset is also kind to the environment.Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe OffsetUnpainted but will fade to a dark metallic colour with age  Environmentally friendly with reduced zinc run off   Self-healing effects on rust and scratches  Fends off salt-water corrosion  Easy installation  110mm projection  Cost-efficient and long-lasting  Resilient against chlorine content.
product.variant_name: Galvanised Steel Gutter Downpipe Swan Neck 87mm - Lindab Magestic

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Conical Bend
product.description: This Round Conical downpipe bend from Lindab has a 70° bend. It creates smooth lines while utilising Lindab's Magestic technology. With male/female connection, the top end of this downpipe connects with outlets and the bottom end connects with pipes. Like the rest of Lindab's Magestic collection, this Conical downpipe bend is reinforced with fantastic magnesium zinc alloy. The innovative coating helps your downpipe bend to stand the test of time, even when fighting all sorts of wear and tear. Red rust is no match for the galvanised steel as it can withstand 20 times more corrosion than zinc coatings without the additional magnesium - not only that, but it also makes for a more environmentally friendly product.Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Conical BendAvailable in several diameters  Unpainted steel that turns into a dark metallic grey with time  Magnesium migrates to repair scratches, cuts, and red rusting  Can be installed in marine and coastal environments due to saltwater testing (ISO 9227)  Easy to install with male/female connections.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Rainwater Diverter
product.description: With an outlet that can be opened or closed, this steel Round rainwater diverter allows for saving water in a water butt/tank. It can be installed in a pipe stack, either prior to the downpipe or after it.This steel construction is galvanised with magnesium zinc alloy, in turn reinforcing it with durability and resilience against damage from corrosion and rust. Lindab's Magestic range of rainwater products is tested to International Standards (ISO 9227) and found to excellently withstand the effects of saltwater spray. The galvanised steel is unpainted but, as it ages, your rainwater diverter will gradually fade into a deeper metallic grey. Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Rainwater DiverterFeatures a wide downpipe diameter range  Environmentally friendly  Cost-efficient and long-wearing  Self-healing as the magnesium fixes red rust and scratches  Appropriate for a wide array of applications, including coastal and marine  Ages fantastically.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Square Galvanised Steel Hopper
product.description: For installation at the top of a pipe, this steel Square hopper head collects additional rainwater while adding a bit of flair to traditional systems. It is particularly suited to roofing that has standing seam panels.Being that this hopper head is part of the Magestic range, it is introduced to a whole variety of benefits. The magnesium zinc alloy coating means that the galvanised steel construction is incredibly durable and immensely resilient. Not only does the added magnesium work to effectively repair scratches and rust, but it also relieves the environment of excess zinc and defends the hopper head against saltwater erosion. product.name: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Fascia Bracket
product.description: This bracket is ideal for securing the Magestic galvanised steel half round gutters by fixing to vertical fascia boards. With a solid 5mm steel structure and 1 standard screw hole and 1 oval hole, this bracket should be installed to create a fall of 10mm per 3.0m run and is recommended a maximum of 800mm interval spacing.This bracket is available in a range of diameters to fit your gutters. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a strengthening magnesium zinc alloy coating, this fascia bracket provides the greatest surface protection for this coated steel surface. This fascia bracket ages superbly, settling into an attractive dark grey metallic surface after 3-5 years from installation. Using magnesium provides elite galvanisation which creates a stable barrier, protecting the porous structure of zinc against corrosion issues.  Salt spray tested; this bracket demonstrates more than 20 times the corrosion resistance of standard zinc galvanised steel without magnesium.Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Fascia Bracket Improved performance in coastal environments  Elite surface protection with magnesium zinc alloy  Minimal environmental impact with reduced zinc resource consumption  Naturally weathers to a dark grey metallic appearance  Quick and easy to install  Long-life with minimal thermal movement  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Cost-effective and affordable  Not influenced by the chlorine content of an environment  Range of sizes available to fit your Magestic Half Round guttersWith self-healing properties, this bracket has improved edge protection from the galvanised coating, migrating to repair red rust on scratches and cuts. This fascia bracket has more than 3 times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanised steel in marine environments with ultimate resistance when encountering aggressive environments. This fascia bracket is suitable for domestic or commercial, traditional or modern properties.
product.variant_name: Lindab Magestic 125mm Half Round Steel Fascia Bracket

product.name: Lindab Magestic Round Galvanised Steel Rafter Bracket
product.description:
Lindab Magestic is an improved galvanised steel material for rainwater system and standing seam applications. Magestic offers the same trusted Lindab product designs with a strengthened magnesium zinc alloy coating.
Galvanised steel is already the most environmentally friendly material used in rainwater systems. Magestic has a reduced impact on zinc resources and less than 25% zinc run off into soils compared to hot dipped galvanised steel. New technology has allowed the material to be developed using magnesium to create a stable barrier to protect zinc’s porous structure against corrosion factors. Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. Magestic has more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of hot dipped galvanised steel. Unpainted metal gutters naturally weather organically adjusting to the installation environment. Magestic settles to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation.
Magestic corrosion in not influenced by the chlorine content of the environment. Natural exposure tests demonstrate more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. Galvanised coatings migrate to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Magnesium is more anodic than zinc making the sacrificial properties of Magestic more active than standard galvanisation.
Features

New elite, strengthed magnesium alloy coating
Highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel
Improved performance in coastal environments
Lowest price Lindab Rainwater System
10 Year Warranty

Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. Magestic has more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of hot dipped galvanised steel. Unpainted metal gutters naturally weather organically adjusting to the installation environment. Magestic settles to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation.
Magestic corrosion in not influenced by the chlorine content of the environment. Natural exposure tests demonstrate more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. Galvanised coatings migrate to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Magnesium is more anodic than zinc making the sacrificial properties of Magestic more active than standard galvanisation.

product.name: Lindab Magestic 210mm Half Round Galvanised Steel Flex-Fit Rafter Bracket
product.description: This Flex-fit Half Round rafter bracket is a product from Lindab's Magestic galvanised rainwater range. It's perfect for projects that lack fascia boards and provides flexible clips that securely support your guttering.The Magestic collection from Lindab is an innovative range of rainwater system products. It uses magnesium zinc alloy to fend off corrosion and rusting, and allows your system to age beautifully. Salt spray tested (ISO 9227), the sturdy and galvanised construction withstands even coastal and marine environments. This bracket is best installed at 600mm spaces, and it can be bent at a specific angle with a KBO bracket bender. product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Downpipe Spike for Pipe Holder
product.description:
When it comes to creating beautiful, environmentally friendly and maintenance free buildings, using the right materials is everything. The Lindab Steel rainwater systems use the very best in lightweight galvanised steel to create a contemporary, cost effective and eco-friendly guttering system that won’t shrink, split or leak - and looks great too.Galvanised steel is already the most environmentally friendly material used in rainwater systems. Magestic has a reduced impact on zinc resources and less than 25% zinc run off into soils compared to hot dipped galvanised steel. New technology has allowed the material to be developed using magnesium to create a stable barrier to protect zinc’s porous structure against corrosion factors. Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. 
Please note this is just the spike for use with the Lindab SSV and SV pipe holders.
This spike is only avaliable in galvanised and the length is determined by how far you want to be away from the wall.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Gutter Outlet
product.description:
Ideal for positioning at any point along your rectangular gutters to connect to a downpipe with a required hole to be created in the gutter, this outlet uses flex-fit flaps for an effortless and reliable installation without the need for silicone or fasteners.Unpainted and naturally weathering to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation, this outlet is available in a range of diameters to fit your downpipe needs. Galvanised and strengthened with a superior magnesium zinc alloy coating, this galvanised steel outlet is provided with the greatest surface protection with over twenty times the corrosion resistance when salt spray tested and three times the endurance in marine settings than standard zinc galvanised steel.
Features & Benefits: Lindab Magestic Galvanised Steel Gutter Outlet Contemporary aestheticMinimal environmental impact with reduced zinc resource consumptionQuick and effortless to installLong life expectancy with minimal thermal movementResistant to corrosion and vandalismSuited to coastal areasCost-effective solutionNot influenced by the chlorine content of a locationWeathers naturally to a dark grey metallic surfaceSuperior exterior protection with magnesium zinc alloy
With improved cut edge protection, this outlet has self-healing qualities where the galvanised surface migrates to repair red rust on cuts and scratches, ensuring corrosion resistance and long life.

product.name: Lindab Magestic Round Galvanised Steel External Corner
product.description:
Lindab Magestic is an improved galvanised steel material for rainwater system and standing seam applications. Magestic offers the same trusted Lindab product designs with a strengthened magnesium zinc alloy coating.
Galvanised steel is already the most environmentally friendly material used in rainwater systems. Magestic has a reduced impact on zinc resources and less than 25% zinc run off into soils compared to hot dipped galvanised steel. New technology has allowed the material to be developed using magnesium to create a stable barrier to protect zinc’s porous structure against corrosion factors. Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. Magestic has more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of hot dipped galvanised steel. Unpainted metal gutters naturally weather organically adjusting to the installation environment. Magestic settles to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation.
Magestic corrosion in not influenced by the chlorine content of the environment. Natural exposure tests demonstrate more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. Galvanised coatings migrate to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Magnesium is more anodic than zinc making the sacrificial properties of Magestic more active than standard galvanisation.
Features

New elite, strengthed magnesium alloy coating
Highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel
Improved performance in coastal environments
Lowest price Lindab Rainwater System
10 Year Warranty

product.name: Lindab Magestic Half Round Galvanised Steel Stop End
product.description:
The Rectangular guttering from Lindab shares all the benefits of the established Rainline steel rainwater system. The combination of this feature with a box shape creates an elegant alternative to traditional guttering whilst having an added advantage of improved functionality.
Lindab have put a twist on the box gutter with an innovative new rectangular profile. A round bead on the forward-facing lip of the gutter is typical of Swedish style steel guttering.
Lindab Magestic is an improved galvanised steel material for rainwater system and standing seam applications. Magestic offers the same trusted Lindab product designs with a strengthened magnesium zinc alloy coating.
Galvanised steel is already the most environmentally friendly material used in rainwater systems. Magestic has a reduced impact on zinc resources and less than 25% zinc run off into soils compared to hot dipped galvanised steel. Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. Magestic has more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of hot dipped galvanised steel. Unpainted metal gutters naturally weather organically adjusting to the installation environment. Magestic settles to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation.
Magestic corrosion in not influenced by the chlorine content of the environment. Natural exposure tests demonstrate more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. Galvanised coatings migrate to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Magnesium is more anodic than zinc making the sacrificial properties of Magestic more active than standard galvanisation.
Lindab Rainline Rectangular Gutter Features and Benefits

140mm size provides 11,000mm2 water carrying area
Contemporary aesthetic
Quick and easy to install
Lowest carbon footprint of any rainwater material
Lightweight but wont crack or split
Inexpensive and virtually maintenance free
11 painted colour options with 15 year warranty
Available in unpainted majestic galvanised finish with 10 year warranty

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Stop End
product.description: This traditional stop end can be easily installed by sitting inside the 190mm Rainline gutter end and fitted using a roll joint method with recommended non-hardening silicone as a sealant. With your choice from a variety of colours and left or right handed, this stop end can fit your building needs for contemporary or classic, small or large buildings.This stop end is durable, lightweight and long-lasting, manufactured from superior galvanised steel, protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains, providing excellent flexibility and scratch and corrosion resistance. Made with an extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this stop end is protected with an extended life expectancy to an excess of 70 years. With minimal maintenance requirements, this stop end will need the occasional top-up with paint for any scratches and is recommended to be cleaned annually.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Stop End Suitable for commercial or domestic properties  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  UV stable with resistance to discolouration and high-build polyester powder coating  Variety of colours to choose from  Left or right handed  Cost-effective and affordable  Long-life with minimal thermal movement  Low maintenance needs  Minimal environmental impact

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Gutter Outlet
product.description:
This steel painted Half Round gutter outlet is an ideal addition to your guttering systems. With flex-flit flaps and click-fit technology to ease installation, this gutter outlet can be installed wherever you need it along the guttering run to join to your downpipe. Lindab's Rainline selection of rainwater systems is highly durable, and this Half Round gutter outlet is no different. With galvanised zinc and polymer grain layers, as well as polyester paint, this outlet is fully equipped with three resilient coats that resist scratches, corrosion, and abrasions.

With galvanised zinc and polymer grain layers, as well as polyester paint, this outlet is fully equipped with three resilient coats that resist scratches, corrosion, and abrasions.

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Self-Locking Stop End
product.description: Lindab's painted Half Round self-locking stop ends go at the end of guttering runs and are completely universal - they can be used both left and right-handed. Simply take off the surplus ear and use it as a push-fit connection. Painted with a defensive and quick to clean polyester paint, Lindab creates their Rainline range in an endless assortment of popular colours to match your rainwater systems. The paint coats two hardwearing layers - polymer grains that defend the products against abrasions and galvanised zinc that fends off rust and corrosion. In turn, this self-locking stop end is immensely durable and has an expected life of 70 years.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Self-Locking Stop End Extensive colour palette  Various gutter diameters  Affordable and high-performing  Easy to install  EPDM rubber gasket that forms tight seals without screws or sealants  Light and movable  Minimised use of raw material to help environment  UV stable  Works for domestic and commercial installations.

product.name: Lindab 190mm Half Round Steel Adjustable Fascia Bracket
product.description:
This extended 240mm fascia bracket is ideal for larger 190mm gutters while using flexible metal clips at the front and back to secure them in place while fixed to fascia boards for a straightforward and effortless assembly process. With four screw holes, this bracket offers a more secure fixing for a reliable guttering installation.From Lindab’s innovative steel painted Rainline guttering range, this bracket has been built to last, made from strong steel with a protective layer of thick, 275g per square metre of zinc which galvanises the surface to produce a non-corrodible material. With a hard-wearing outer coating of high-build polyester paint, this bracket is shielded with damage resistance and excellent flexibility. With a long-lasting life expectancy of more than 70 years, this bracket has minimal maintenance requirements with the occasional touch-up with paint for any scratches and recommended yearly cleaning.

Features & Benefits: Lindab 190mm Half Round Steel Adjustable Fascia Bracket Variety of colours to choose fromLong-lasting with minimal thermal movementMinimal maintenanceDurable galvanised steel with polyester powder coatingVandalism and corrosion resistantCost-effectiveQuick and easy to installStylish design for traditional or modern buildingsLow environmental impact
With a variety of colours to choose from to match your gutters, this bracket is UV stable with superb colourfastness and resilience against discolouration.

product.description: This self-sealing gutter joint is ideal for connecting the Rainline gutters or gutter angles together and has been designed with a simple click and lock mechanism for a quick and easy installation without the need for sealant or screws. Made with a built-in EPDM rubber gasket, this gutter joint ensures a watertight seal between your gutters with minimal thermal movement.Available in a wide range of colours and diameters to fit your building and guttering needs, this gutter joint is ideal for large or small, classic or contemporary buildings. Made from superior steel, this gutter joint is durable, long-lasting and lightweight. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains, this gutter joint is provided with corrosion resistance, scratch resistance and excellent flexibility.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Gutter Joint with Rubber Seal Ideal for domestic or commercial buildings  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  UV stabilised with discolouration resistance and high-build polyester powder coating  Range of diameters and colours to choose from  Affordable and cost-effective  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Minimal maintenance requirements  Low environmental impactWith an extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this gutter joint is protected with an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With low maintenance requirements, this gutter joint is recommended to be cleaned annually and will need the occasional top-up with paint for any scratches.

product.name: Lindab 150mm Half Round Steel Rafter Bracket
product.description:
This shorter rafter bar is ideal for refurbishment installations and is available in a range of sizes to fit and secure the Steel Painted Half Round gutters by fixing to roof rafters, recommended at a maximum of 800mm interval spacing. Manufactured from solid 5mm steel, this rafter bracket is 25mm wide with 4 fixing holes.
These rafter brackets should be installed to create a fall of 10mm per 3m run and should be bent to the required angle using a bracket bender. Made from superior steel, this rafter bracket is lightweight, durable and long-lasting. Manufactured with a galvanised steel core with a thick protective layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains, this rafter bracket has excellent flexibility and is corrosion and scratch resistant. Coated with extra-durable high-build polyester, this rafter bracket is protected with an extended life expectancy to an excess of 70 years.
Features & Benefits: Lindab 150mm Half Round Steel Rafter Bracket Ideal for classic or contemporary buildings with refurbishment installations  Affordable and cost-effective Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  UV stable and resistant to discolouration with high-build polyester powder coating  Anthracite metallic grey RAL 9007 to the nearest colour match  Range of diameters to choose from to fit your guttering system  Minimal environmental impact  Made to last with minimal thermal movement  Minimal maintenance requirements
With low maintenance needs, this rafter bracket requires the occasional touch-up with paint for any scratches and recommended yearly cleaning. This rafter bracket is suitable for modern or traditional buildings.

This Half Round internal gutter angle comes available in a large variety of colours, gutter diameters, and angles in order to suit your every possible need. Environmentally friendly and low maintenance, Lindab’s Steel Rainline range utilises zinc coated steel to ensure reliability and ease.

This Half Round internal gutter angle comes available in a large variety of colours, gutter diameters, and angles in order to suit your every possible need. Environmentally friendly and low maintenance, Lindab’s Steel Rainline range utilises zinc coated steel to ensure reliability and ease.
Installation is made easy with a lightweight structure and without the need for sealants or special tools. With a life expectancy of 70 years and minimal thermal movement to prevent breakages, this gutter angle has a large range of benefits that make for a quality product.
Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Internal Gutter Corner Vandal resistantQuality steelVersatile across colours, angles, and dimensionsEnvironmentally kindCost-effective and long-lasting2 gutter joints are required per angleIdeal for modern and traditional buildings, either refurbished or new buildLightweight with straightforward installation processesLow maintenance

product.name: Lindab 330mm Half Round Steel Flex-Fit Rafter Bracket
product.description: This flex-fit rafter bracket has metal clips in the back and front, making for a very forgiving assembly phase. These flexible clips are attached with stainless steel rivets to hold your Rainline 190mm gutters in place by fixing to roof rafters. Manufactured from solid 6mm steel, this rafter bracket has a width of 30mm with 4 fixing holes.Quick and easy to install to create a fall of 10mm per 3.0m run with a recommended maximum of 800mm interval spacing, this bracket should be bent to your required angle using a bracket bender. With a variety of colours to choose from to match your gutters, this bracket is suitable for small or large, classic or contemporary properties. Made from superior galvanised steel, this rafter bracket is long-lasting, durable and lightweight, with a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains, providing scratch and corrosion resistance and excellent flexibility.Features & Benefits: Lindab 330mm Half Round Steel Flex-Fit Rafter Bracket Superior galvanised steel material  Suitable for domestic or commercial properties  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Resistant to discolouration and UV stabilised with high-build polyester powder coating  Variety of colours to choose from  Cost-effective and affordable  Long-life with minimal thermal expansion and contraction  Low maintenance needs  Minimal environmental impactWith an extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this rafter bracket is protected with an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With minimal maintenance requirements, this bracket is recommended to be cleaned annually and will need occasional top-ups with paint for any scratches.

product.name: Lindab 200mm Half Round Steel Rafter Bracket
product.description: This rafter bracket is the most popular bracket for UK installations, requiring fairly straight boards or roof edges to be attached to and is quick and easy to assemble. Made from solid 5mm steel this rafter bracket is 25mm wide with 4 fixing holes. Used for securing the Rainline gutters by fixing to roof rafters, these brackets are recommended to be fixed at a maximum of 800mm interval spacing.This rafter bracket should be bent to the required angle using a bracket bender and installed to create a fall of 10mm per 3.0m run. With a range of diameters and colours to fit your gutter needs, this bracket is ideal for large or small, classic or contemporary buildings. Made from superior galvanised steel, this bracket is lightweight, durable and long-lasting, protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains which provides excellent flexibility and corrosion and scratch resistance.Features & Benefits: Lindab 200mm Half Round Steel Rafter Bracket Ideal for commercial or domestic properties  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  UV stabilised and resistant to discolouration with high-build polyester powder coating  Range of colours and diameters to fit your gutters and building needs  Affordable and cost-effective  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Minimal maintenance needs  Low environmental impactProtected with an extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this bracket has an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. This low maintenance bracket is recommended to be cleaned annually and will need the occasional top-up with paint for any scratches.

Used for securing the Rainline gutters by fixing to roof rafters, these brackets are recommended to be fixed at a maximum of 800mm interval spacing.This rafter bracket should be bent to the required angle using a bracket bender and installed to create a fall of 10mm per 3.0m run. With a range of diameters and colours to fit your gutter needs, this bracket is ideal for large or small, classic or contemporary buildings. Made from superior galvanised steel, this bracket is lightweight, durable and long-lasting, protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains which provides excellent flexibility and corrosion and scratch resistance.Features & Benefits: Lindab 200mm Half Round Steel Rafter Bracket Ideal for commercial or domestic properties  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  UV stabilised and resistant to discolouration with high-build polyester powder coating  Range of colours and diameters to fit your gutters and building needs  Affordable and cost-effective  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Minimal maintenance needs  Low environmental impactProtected with an extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this bracket has an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. This low maintenance bracket is recommended to be cleaned annually and will need the occasional top-up with paint for any scratches.

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Rise & Fall Bracket
product.description: This solid 5mm steel rise and fall bracket has a fixing nut and a 250mm threaded bar used to adjust your gutter levels. Recommended to be installed at a maximum of 800mm interval spacing and creating a fall of 10mm per 3.0m run, these brackets are easy to install and can be used for securing your Rainline gutters by driving the 300mm spike into your wall.Suitable for commercial or domestic buildings, this rise and fall bracket is available in a range of diameters and colours to fit your guttering and building needs. Manufactured from superior steel, this bracket is long-lasting, lightweight and durable. With galvanised steel, this bracket has a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains which provides excellent flexibility, scratch resistance and corrosion resistance.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Rise & Fall Bracket Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Ideal for small or large, contemporary or classic buildings  UV stable and resistant to discolouring with high-build polyester powder coating  Cost-effective and affordable  Variety of colours and diameters to choose from  Long-life with minimal thermal movement  Low environmental impact  Low maintenance requirementsThis extra-durable high-build polyester coating is protective, extending the life expectancy of your bracket to an excess of 7NULL years. With minimal maintenance needs, this bracket occasional needs to be topped up with paint for any scratches and annual cleaning is recommended.

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Adjustable Fascia Bracket
product.description: This adjustable snap fascia bracket is versatile and can easily be adjusted for different roof pitches and on angled fascia boards, locking place at 7°, 14°, 18°, 22°, 27°, 38° or 45° angles to support your half-round gutters with a fixed hook front. Quick and easy to install, this fascia bracket requires 1 screw fixing per bracket recommended at 800mm interval spacing.With a wide variety of colours and diameters to choose from to match your gutters, this fascia bracket is manufactured from superior steel that is durable, long-lasting and lightweight. Made with a top coating of coloured polymer grains and a galvanised steel core with a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc, this fascia bracket is scratch-resistant, corrosion-resistant and has excellent flexibility. Painted with a protective, extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this fascia bracket has a life expectancy extended to an excess of 70 years.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Adjustable Fascia Bracket Suitable for small or large, contemporary or classic buildings  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Cost-effective and affordable  Resistant to discolouring with UV stabilised high-build polyester powder coating  Range of colours and diameters to fit your building needs  Low environmental impact  Long life with minimal thermal movement  Low maintenanceWith minimal maintenance requirements, this fascia bracket needs the occasional top-up of paint for any scratches and recommended annual cleaning. This fascia bracket is suitable for commercial or domestic buildings.

Quick and easy to install, this fascia bracket requires 1 screw fixing per bracket recommended at 800mm interval spacing.With a wide variety of colours and diameters to choose from to match your gutters, this fascia bracket is manufactured from superior steel that is durable, long-lasting and lightweight. Made with a top coating of coloured polymer grains and a galvanised steel core with a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc, this fascia bracket is scratch-resistant, corrosion-resistant and has excellent flexibility. Painted with a protective, extra-durable high-build polyester coating, this fascia bracket has a life expectancy extended to an excess of 70 years.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Adjustable Fascia Bracket Suitable for small or large, contemporary or classic buildings  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Cost-effective and affordable  Resistant to discolouring with UV stabilised high-build polyester powder coating  Range of colours and diameters to fit your building needs  Low environmental impact  Long life with minimal thermal movement  Low maintenanceWith minimal maintenance requirements, this fascia bracket needs the occasional top-up of paint for any scratches and recommended annual cleaning. This fascia bracket is suitable for commercial or domestic buildings.
product.variant_name: Lindab 125mm Round Steel Adjustable Snap-On Bracket - Black

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Corner Overflow Protector
product.description: By effortlessly hooking onto corner sections of guttering that may be especially prone to high flow, this Half Round corner overflow protector prevents overspill. It is one of many items from Lindab’s painted Rainline range.Manufactured from high-quality steel, the Rainline range is galvanised with zinc and layered with polymer grains – in turn making it hard to scratch and scuff, as well as corrosion resistant. Protection is only further reinforced with the polyester paint that lessens maintenance but lengthens life expectancy upwards of 70 years. Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Corner Overflow Protector Available in a variety of popular colours  Reduced environmental damage  UV stabilised polyester paint layer to prevent distortion and warping  Lightweight construction that is easy to handle and install  Cost-effective  Fights corrosion and scuffing  Compatible with commercial and domestic applications.

product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Gutter
product.description: This traditional rectangular gutter has a box profile and a rounded bead front lip detail for a faster and easier installation, simple to install with Lindab click-lock gutter joints or a traditional craft method. Made of pre-coated galvanised steel with a 0.6mm thickness, this high-quality gutter ensures a long-life installation.Available in a range of colours to perfectly match your gutter system, this gutter is ideal for a variety of applications including small or large, classic or contemporary buildings. Made from superior steel, this gutter is long-lasting, robust and lightweight. This galvanised steel gutter is protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains providing corrosion resistance, scratch resistance and excellent flexibility.Features & Benefits: Lindab Rectangular Steel Gutter Low maintenance requirements  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  UV stable and resistant to discolouring with a high-build polyester powder coating  Minimal environmental impact  Cost-effective and affordable  Suitable for domestic or commercial buildings  Variety of colours available to choose from  Long-life with minimal thermal movementThe extra-durable high-build polyester powder coating protects this gutter extending its life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With minimal maintenance requirements, this gutter needs the occasional touch-up with paint for any scratches and is recommended to be cleaned yearly to ensure long service life. Fully UV stabilised, this gutter is resistant to discolouration.
product.variant_name: Lindab 140mm Rectangular Gutter - Antique White

product.name: Lindab Half Round Steel Straight Overflow Protector
product.description: This straight overflow protector can be used to prevent rainwater from overflowing at high flow sections and can easily be retrofitted onto a straight gutter section by hooking over the gutter bead to secure using attached hooks with stainless steel rivets. Ideal for commercial or domestic buildings, this protector is quick and easy to install.With a range of colours and diameters to choose from to fit your guttering needs, this overflow protector is manufactured from high-performance steel and is durable, lightweight and long-lasting. Made from galvanised steel with a protected steel core coated with a 275g per square metre thick layer of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains, this overflow protector is corrosion-resistant, scratch-resistant and has excellent flexibility.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel Straight Overflow Protector Low maintenance requirements  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Suitable for small or large, classic or contemporary buildings  Cost-effective and affordable  UV stable with high-build polyester powder coatings and excellent colourfastness  Range of colours and diameters available to choose from  Low environmental impact  Long-life with minimal thermal movementCoated with high-build, extra-durable polyester paint, this overflow protection has provided protection and has an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With minimal maintenance requirements, this overflow protector is recommended to be cleaned annually with the occasional top-up of any scratched paint.

product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Gutter Outlet
product.description:
This rectangular outlet can be positioned at any point along your gutters to connect to a downpipe, requiring a hole to be created in the gutter. This gutter outlet is quick and easy to install, using flex-fit flaps to be secured without the need for fasteners or silicone, fitting perfectly to your steel painted rectangular gutters. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a 0.6mm thickness, this traditional box profile gutter outlet is available in a range of colours and downpipe diameters to fit and match your 140mm rectangular gutters and downpipes. Suitable for a variety of applications, this gutter outlet is ideal for a range of classic or contemporary buildings. Manufactured from high-quality steel, this gutter outlet is robust, lightweight and long-lasting. With a protective galvanising thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains, this gutter outlet has excellent flexibility and is scratch and corrosion resistant.
Features & Benefits: Lindab Rectangular Steel Gutter Outlet Suitable for traditional or modern buildings  Variety of colours and downpipe diameters available  Cost-effective and affordable  Minimal environmental impact  Resistant to discolouration and UV stable with a high-build polyester powder coating  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Low maintenance requirements  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Quick and easy to install
Protected with extra-durable high-build polyester powder coatings, this gutter outlet has an extended life expectancy to an excess of 70 years. With minimal maintenance needs, this gutter outlet requires the occasional top-up with paint for any scratches and is recommended to be cleaned yearly to ensure a long life. UV stabilised, this gutter outlet is resistant to discolouration and has excellent colourfastness.

product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Gutter Joint
product.description:
Those familiar with Lindab rainline guttering will know how the well-designed gutter joints simplify secure installation.
The new rectangular shape with front bead allows the same type of one-piece joint to work with a box profile.
Trained professionals will also be able to use the bead design to install the system using craft jointing methods.
The Rectangular guttering from Lindab shares all the benefits of the established Rainline steel rainwater system.
Lindab Rainline Rectangular Gutter Joint Features and Benefits

Quicker to install
Easy joint clip similar to half-round system
Lowest carbon footprint of any rainwater material
Lightweight but wont crack or split
Inexpensive and virtually maintenance free
11 painted colour options with 15 year warranty
Available in unpainted majestic galvanised finish with 10 year warranty

product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Internal Gutter Corner
product.description: This 90° rectangular gutter internal angle fits with the 140mm Lindab Steel Painted Rainline system when fitted and is welded using high quality galvanised steel to ensure a long-lasting installation. Manufactured with polyester powder coated galvanised steel with a 0.6mm thickness, box profile and rounded bead front lip detail.With a variety of colours to choose from to perfectly match your gutters, this gutter angle is quick and easy to install with Lindab click-lock gutter joints or a traditional craft method. This gutter angle is suitable for a variety of applications including large or small, classic or contemporary buildings with roof features such as recesses or extensions. This superior steel gutter angle is robust, lightweight and long-lasting. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains, this gutter angle provides excellent flexibility, corrosion resistance and scratch resistance.Features & Benefits: Lindab Rectangular Steel Internal Gutter Corner Range of colours available  Ideal for commercial or domestic buildings  Affordable and cost-effective  Low environmental impact  UV stabilised and resistant to discolouration with a high-build polyester powder coating  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Minimal maintenance requirements  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movementWith extra-durable high-build polyester powder coating, this gutter angle is protected with an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With low maintenance needs, this gutter angle requires the occasional touch-up with paint for any scratches and is recommended to be cleaned annually to ensure long service life.

This rectangular gutter angle is ideal for diverting rainwater around the corners of your building as an essential component of your guttering system. Combining a box shape with a modern rectangular profile, this gutter angle has a round bead on the forward-facing lip which is typical of Swedish-style guttering as a stylish alternative to traditional guttering with the additional advantage of improved practicality.Features & Benefits: Lindab Rectangular Steel External Gutter Corner Various colour options to choose fromInexpensive, low maintenance systemDurable materials will not crack or splitLightweight constructionEasy to install with gutter joints or a traditional craft method90° external gutter angle15-year warranty

product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Fascia Bracket
product.description: This short rectangular bracket with clips can be used on your fascia board to fully support your steel painted rectangular 140mm gutters. With a classic box profile, this fascia bracket is available in a variety of colours to perfectly match your gutters and is ideal for a variety of modern or traditional buildings.Made of powder-coated galvanised steel with a 5mm thickness, this high-quality fascia bracket ensures a reliable installation and is quick and easy to fit. This fascia bracket is made from superior steel and is long-lasting, lightweight and robust. Galvanised with a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top layer of coloured polymer grains, this fascia bracket has excellent flexibility and is corrosion and scratch resistant. With extra-durable high-build polyester powder coatings, this fascia bracket is protected with an extended life expectancy to an excess of 70 years.Features & Benefits: Lindab Rectangular Steel Fascia Bracket Ideal for classic or contemporary buildings  Available in a variety of colours  Affordable and cost-effective  Low environmental impact  UV stabilised and resistant to discolouration with a high-build polyester powder coating  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Minimal maintenance requirements  Made to last with minimal thermal movement  Quick and easy to installWith low maintenance needs, this fascia bracket is recommended to be cleaned annually to ensure long service life and requires the occasional touch-up with paint for any scratches. This UV stabilised fascia bracket has excellent colourfastness and is resistant to discolouration. These fascia brackets are recommended to be installed at 6NULLNULLmm spacing and should create a fall of 1NULLmm per 3m run.

product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Rafter Bracket
product.description: From Lindab's innovative range of Rainline painted steel rainwater systems, this Rectangular Rafter Bracket is ideal for holding your gutters in place with the use of flexible clips at the back and front. Coordinating a box shape as an elegant alternative to traditional guttering, it also has the additional benefit of enhanced functionality.Incorporating a unique twist on the box gutters with a rectangular profile, this rafter bracket provides support for rectangular gutters with a round bead on the forward-facing lip which is characteristic of Swedish-style guttering.Features & Benefits: Lindab Rectangular Steel Rafter Bracket Variety of colour optionsCost-effectiveVirtually maintenance-freeLightweightWill not split or crackLowest carbon footprint of any rainwater system materialMultiple screw holes for secure fixing15-year warranty

product.description: From Lindab's innovative range of Rainline painted steel rainwater systems, this Rectangular Rafter Bracket is ideal for holding your gutters in place with the use of flexible clips at the back and front. Coordinating a box shape as an elegant alternative to traditional guttering, it also has the additional benefit of enhanced functionality.Incorporating a unique twist on the box gutters with a rectangular profile, this rafter bracket provides support for rectangular gutters with a round bead on the forward-facing lip which is characteristic of Swedish-style guttering.Features & Benefits: Lindab Rectangular Steel Rafter Bracket Variety of colour optionsCost-effectiveVirtually maintenance-freeLightweightWill not split or crackLowest carbon footprint of any rainwater system materialMultiple screw holes for secure fixing15-year warranty
product.variant_name: Lindab 140mm Rectangular Rafter Bracket - Anthracite Grey

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Drain Shoe
product.description: This drain shoe can be used to connect a downpipe directly to a ground drainpipe with the drain shoe fitting on the outside of the downpipe, the drain shoe cover sits over the drainpipe. Quick and easy to install by simply pushing the pipes together, this drain shoe is ideal for commercial or domestic properties.With minimal maintenance requirements, this drain shoe can be lifted to provide maintenance access, is recommended to be cleaned annually and requires the occasional top-up with paint for any scratches. This drain shoe is lightweight, long-lasting and robust, manufactured from superior galvanised steel. With a protective thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a painted top coating of coloured polymer grains, this drain shoe has excellent flexibility, scratch resistance and corrosion resistance.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Drain Shoe Variety of colours and downpipe diameters to choose from  Superior galvanised steel material  Suitable for small or large, classic or contemporary buildings  Resistant to discolouration and UV stable with high-build polyester powder coating  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Low maintenance needs  Cost-effective and affordable  Minimal environmental impact  Long-life with minimal thermal movementAvailable in a range of colours and diameters to match your downpipes, this drain shoe is protected with an extra-durable high-build polyester powder coating which extends its life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years.

product.name: Lindab 75mm & 87mm Steel Rainwater Diverter
product.description: This high-density polythene rainwater diverter kit is made from plastic components that divert water through a flexible hose into a water butt to collect rainwater. Suitable for fitting to 75mm or 87mm pipe stacks, this diverter is quick and easy to fix to a wall with 2 screw holes. Available in your choice of colour, this diverter is suitable for a variety of buildings including contemporary or classic properties. product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Stop End
product.description:
Complete your Lindab guttering system with these Lindab Rectangular Stop Ends.
Lindab have put a twist on the box gutter with an innovative rectangular profile. A round bead on the forward-facing lip of the gutter is typical of Swedish style steel guttering. The combination of this feature with a box shape creates an elegant alternative to traditional guttering whilst having an added advantage of improved functionality.
The Rectangular guttering from Lindab shares all the benefits of the established Rainline steel rainwater system.
Lindab Rainline Rectangular Stop End Features and Benefits

Left hand and right hand options
Simple push fit design
Lowest carbon footprint of any rainwater material
Lightweight but wont crack or split
Inexpensive and virtually maintenance free
11 painted colour options with 15 year warranty
Available in unpainted majestic galvanised finish with 10 year warranty
product.variant_name: Lindab Steel Rectangular Left Hand Stop End Painted Tile Red 140mm

product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Stop End
product.description:
Complete your Lindab guttering system with these Lindab Rectangular Stop Ends.
Lindab have put a twist on the box gutter with an innovative rectangular profile. A round bead on the forward-facing lip of the gutter is typical of Swedish style steel guttering. The combination of this feature with a box shape creates an elegant alternative to traditional guttering whilst having an added advantage of improved functionality.
The Rectangular guttering from Lindab shares all the benefits of the established Rainline steel rainwater system.
Lindab Rainline Rectangular Stop End Features and Benefits

Left hand and right hand options
Simple push fit design
Lowest carbon footprint of any rainwater material
Lightweight but wont crack or split
Inexpensive and virtually maintenance free
11 painted colour options with 15 year warranty
Available in unpainted majestic galvanised finish with 10 year warranty
product.variant_name: Lindab 140mm Rectangular Steel Left Handed Stop End - Antique White

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe
product.description: Available in a range of lengths, diameters and colours to fit your building requirements, this downpipe has been roll-formed with 0.6mm of steel with a solid seam (0.7mm for the 120mm pipe) and is suitable for a variety of applications including commercial or domestic buildings. Made from high-performance steel, this downpipe is durable, lightweight and long-lasting.Manufactured from galvanised steel, this downpipe is coated with a thick layer of zinc to protect the steel core from corrosion and a top coating of coloured polymer grains with scratch resistance and excellent flexibility. With extra-durable, high-build polyester paint coating, this downpipe has provided protection, extending its life expectancy to an excess of 70 years with minimal maintenance needs. With recommended annual cleaning, this downpipe requires the occasional touch up of any scratched paint. This UV stabilised downpipe has minimal thermal expansion and excellent colourfastness.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Quick and easy to install with hidden male/female joints simply pushed to fit together  Low environmental impact  Low maintenance requirements  Long-life with minimal thermal movement  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Range of colours, lengths and diameters available  Cost-effective and affordable  UV stabilised with high-build polyester powder coatings  Suitable for classic or contemporary, large or small buildings

product.description: Available in a range of lengths, diameters and colours to fit your building requirements, this downpipe has been roll-formed with 0.6mm of steel with a solid seam (0.7mm for the 120mm pipe) and is suitable for a variety of applications including commercial or domestic buildings. Made from high-performance steel, this downpipe is durable, lightweight and long-lasting.Manufactured from galvanised steel, this downpipe is coated with a thick layer of zinc to protect the steel core from corrosion and a top coating of coloured polymer grains with scratch resistance and excellent flexibility. With extra-durable, high-build polyester paint coating, this downpipe has provided protection, extending its life expectancy to an excess of 70 years with minimal maintenance needs. With recommended annual cleaning, this downpipe requires the occasional touch up of any scratched paint. This UV stabilised downpipe has minimal thermal expansion and excellent colourfastness.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Quick and easy to install with hidden male/female joints simply pushed to fit together  Low environmental impact  Low maintenance requirements  Long-life with minimal thermal movement  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Range of colours, lengths and diameters available  Cost-effective and affordable  UV stabilised with high-build polyester powder coatings  Suitable for classic or contemporary, large or small buildings

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Bracket
product.description: This painted pipe holder ensures quick fastening of your downpipes without a locking piece to fix your pipes to the wall and is recommended to be fitted at a maximum of 1.5m interval spacing. Quick and easy to install using screw-to-wall fixing or drive-in fixing, this bracket is ideal for domestic or commercial buildings.Available in a range of diameters and colours to match your downpipes, this bracket is made from high-performance steel and is lightweight, durable and long-lasting. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a protected steel core coated with a thick layer of zinc, this bracket resists corrosion and has a top layer of coloured polymer grains with excellent flexibility and scratch resistance. product.name: Lindab Round Steel Sliding Downpipe
product.description:
This steel painted sliding downpipe is perfect for use with an RT drain trap. By simply fitting around the pipe, this product fluidly slides up to provide an entrance for maintenance and allows you to clear out any debris or blockages.From Lindab’s comprehensive Rainline range of rainwater products, this sliding downpipe is made from high-quality steel that is coated with zinc and polymer grains. This ensures that your sliding downpipe is resistant to abrasions and corrosion, and protection is even further reinforced by polyester paint. It not only provides sleek and satisfying finishes, but minimises maintenance and lengthens lifespan. 
Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Sliding Downpipe Choose from multiple downpipe diametersAvailable in popular coloursReduced impact on environmentUV stable polyester paint that prevents distortionFor use in commercial and domestic applicationsEasy to move and lightweight constructionCost-effective and longevityProtected from abrasions and corrosion

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Rod Access Pipe
product.description: This rodding access pipe has an access door in a galvanised finish with plastic handles regardless of the pipe colour chosen and is available in a range of colours and diameters to match your gutters and pipes. Used to provide access for maintenance to remove pipe blockages, this pipe has a steel door that can be unlocked and removed using plastic handles.Made from lightweight, durable and long-lasting galvanised steel, this pipe has a thick layer of zinc coating to protect the steel core from corrosion and a top layer of coloured polymer grains with excellent flexibility and scratch resistance. Providing protection with the extra-durable, high-build polyester paint coating extends the life expectancy of this pipe to an excess of 70 years with low maintenance needs. This pipe requires annual cleaning with the occasional touch up of any scratched paint. With UV stability, this access pipe has excellent colourfastness and minimal thermal expansion. Ideal for a variety of applications, this rod access pipe is suitable for commercial or domestic buildings.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Rod Access Pipe Suited to small or large, contemporary or classic buildings  UV stabilised with high-build polyester powder coatings  Affordable and cost-effective  Range of diameters and colours to choose from  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Minimal maintenance needs  Lightweight, quick and easy to install by simply pushing pipes together  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Minimal environmental impact

Made from high-performance steel, this shoe ensures a lightweight, long-lasting and durable installation. Easily fits directly to a pipe with a rolled rim to ensure no sharp edges.Manufactured from galvanised steel with a thick layer of zinc coating, protecting the steel core from corrosion and a top coating of coloured polymer grains with scratch resistance and excellent flexibility. The extra-durable, high-build polyester paint coating provides protection, extending the life expectancy of this shoe to an excess of 70 years with minimal maintenance requirements with annual cleaning recommended and occasional touch up of any scratched paint. With UV stability, this shoe is resistant to discolouration with minimal thermal expansion and is ideal for a variety of applications including domestic or commercial buildings.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Outlet Shoe Low environmental impact  Made to last with minimal thermal movement  Lightweight, quick and easy to install by pushing together  Low maintenance needs  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Range of colours and diameters to choose from  Cost-effective and affordable  UV stability with high-build polyester coatings  Suitable for large or small, classic or contemporary buildings

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Universal Bracket
product.description:
This universal pipe bracket can be used for fixing downpipes to the wall with screw fixes and SST spike drive-in fixes. In 1.5m interval spacing the bracket clicks into place over the downpipe, compatible with all Lindab Rainline pipes.
Lindab HB polyester painted steel guttering
Lindab steel guttering can be fitted to new builds and refurbishments to offer a subtle and light-coloured guttering system that isn’t obtrusive or distracting from the overall aesthetic of the property. With a 70-year life expectancy, HB polyester painted guttering won’t split, leak, shrink or fade and the 275g layer of zinc that this steel guttering is coated in won’t discolour or rust.
Extremely low maintenance, Lindab HB polyester painted steel guttering is modern and inexpensive, perfect for homeowners who need longevity and durability from their guttering system without the hassle of constant maintenance. This system only needs the occasional wipe down. The steel guttering itself is made from galvanized steel guttering, coated in zinc for extra durability, and the HB polyester paint is warrantied for 15 years. To ensure safety and security this HB polyester painted steel guttering can be fit flush to walls so people can’t use it to scale up buildings.

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Conical Bend
product.description:
Conical pipe bends provide a way of overcoming facade features or to offset pipe stacks whilst maintaining the aesthetics of your Lindab Rainline gutter system. The clean lines and conical shape combine to blend in with the system whilst allowing a male/female connection. Male spigot ends of pipes and outlets can fit perfectly in the top of the bend while the bottom fits into a standard pipe.
This bend provides a 70° angle.
Lindab HB polyester painted steel guttering
This system can be used for new buildings and refurbishment projects to match any external decoration. It could also be used as a subtle guttering system and installed in projects where guttering needs to appear discreet. HB polyester painted guttering from the Lindab Rainline collection is coated with a layer of 275g of zinc that won't discolour or rust, meaning this guttering system offers a solution that won't split, leak, shrink or fade.
This modern and cost-effective half round guttering system is low maintenance, requiring only the occasional wipe down. It's the perfect solution for homeowners who don't want the fuss of constant upkeep but would like to install a durable, long-lasting gutter system. Manufactured from lightweight galvanized steel, the gutters and downpipes can be fit flush to the wall in order to avoid people climbing the building.
All guttering in the HB polyester painted Lindab Rainline range comes with a 15-year warranty on the HB polyester painted coating and has a 70-year life expectancy.
product.variant_name: Lindab 75mm 70dg Conical Pipe Bend - Anthracite Metallic

Male spigot ends of pipes and outlets can fit perfectly in the top of the bend while the bottom fits into a standard pipe.
This bend provides a 70° angle.
Lindab HB polyester painted steel guttering
This system can be used for new buildings and refurbishment projects to match any external decoration. It could also be used as a subtle guttering system and installed in projects where guttering needs to appear discreet. HB polyester painted guttering from the Lindab Rainline collection is coated with a layer of 275g of zinc that won't discolour or rust, meaning this guttering system offers a solution that won't split, leak, shrink or fade.
This modern and cost-effective half round guttering system is low maintenance, requiring only the occasional wipe down. It's the perfect solution for homeowners who don't want the fuss of constant upkeep but would like to install a durable, long-lasting gutter system. Manufactured from lightweight galvanized steel, the gutters and downpipes can be fit flush to the wall in order to avoid people climbing the building.
All guttering in the HB polyester painted Lindab Rainline range comes with a 15-year warranty on the HB polyester painted coating and has a 70-year life expectancy.

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Intermediate Downpipe
product.description: This painted Round intermediate downpipe from Lindab is useful for many different reasons. It fits in perfectly between two bends in order to create an offset, or it can form two smaller pipe pieces if you cut it. Available in different colours, downpipe diameters, and lengths, this intermediate pipe is suited to a range of rainwater systems within Lindab’s Rainline range. With UV stability and anti-abrasion coating, it aims to last up to 70 years. The galvanised zinc and polymer grain layer both function to combat and deflect rusting and scratches. The polyester paint also creates a protective barrier that keeps your product intact while minimising the need for constant maintenance. Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Intermediate Downpipe Durable steel coated with polyester paint for a variety of colours  A vast range of downpipe diameters and lengths  Cost-efficient and long-lasting  Simple installations and easy handling  When used in an offset can create up to 200mm projection  Stabilised against UV damage  Lower environmental impact  Suited to new or renovated modern builds and domestic or commercial applications.

product.description: This painted Round intermediate downpipe from Lindab is useful for many different reasons. It fits in perfectly between two bends in order to create an offset, or it can form two smaller pipe pieces if you cut it. Available in different colours, downpipe diameters, and lengths, this intermediate pipe is suited to a range of rainwater systems within Lindab’s Rainline range. With UV stability and anti-abrasion coating, it aims to last up to 70 years. The galvanised zinc and polymer grain layer both function to combat and deflect rusting and scratches. The polyester paint also creates a protective barrier that keeps your product intact while minimising the need for constant maintenance. Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Intermediate Downpipe Durable steel coated with polyester paint for a variety of colours  A vast range of downpipe diameters and lengths  Cost-efficient and long-lasting  Simple installations and easy handling  When used in an offset can create up to 200mm projection  Stabilised against UV damage  Lower environmental impact  Suited to new or renovated modern builds and domestic or commercial applications.

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Manual Rainwater Diverter
product.description: With an adjustable shoe for saving the rainwater in a water butt, this rainwater diverter has an outlet spout that manually opens and closes, attached with stainless steel rivets. Fitting directly to a pipe stack, this diverter is quick and easy to install by simply pushing together with pipes. This diverter is available in a range of diameters and colours to fit your building needs.Long-lasting, durable and lightweight, this diverter is made from high-performance, galvanised steel with a protected steel core coated with a thick layer of zinc, resisting corrosion and a top layer of coloured polymer grains with scratch resistance and excellent flexibility. Providing protection coated with extra-durable, high-build polyester paint, extends the life expectancy of this diverter to an excess of 70 years with minimal maintenance requirements. Requiring the occasional top-up of any scratched paint, this diverter is recommended to be cleaned annually. Ideal for a range of applications, this diverter is suitable for commercial or domestic buildings.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Manual Rainwater Diverter Low environmental impact  Long-life with minimal thermal movement  Range of colours and diameters available  UV stable with high-build polyester powder coatings and excellent colourfastness  Suitable for classic or contemporary, small or large buildings  Cost-effective and affordable  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  Low maintenance requirements  Easy and quick to install by simply pushing the pipe together
product.variant_name: Lindab 75mm Manual Rainwater Diverter - Antique White

This downpipe bend is available in a variety of colours, diameters and angles to fit your building requirements.This lightweight, long-lasting and durable downpipe bend is made from high-performance, galvanised steel coated with a thick layer of zinc, protecting the steel core from corrosion and a top layer of coloured polymer grains with excellent flexibility and scratch resistance. This extra-durable, high-build polyester paint coating provides protection, extending the life expectancy of this downpipe bend to an excess of 70 years with low maintenance requirements. This downpipe bend requires the occasional top-up of any scratched paint and recommended annual cleaning. This downpipe bend is suitable for a variety of applications such as domestic or commercial buildings.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Bend Ideal for contemporary or classic, large or small buildings  UV stabilised with high-build polyester powder coatings and excellent colourfastness  Affordable and cost-effective  Range of diameters, lengths and colours to choose from  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Minimal maintenance requirements  Minimal environmental impacts  Quick and easy to install by simply pushing pipe fittings together

product.name: Lindab Leafline Gutter Brush
product.description:
Available in 3 metre continuous lengths and in three diameters (100mm, 125mm and 150mm), Leafline is easy to install. Simply place one or more in your guttering; they even bend around corners. No special tools or training are required and it only takes a matter of minutes. The leafline gutter brush is virtually indestructible, made of stainless steel wire core with polypropylene bristles, so it will be years before you have to think about this problem again.
Features

Prevents leaves and debris build-up in guttering.
Stops birds and rodents entering loft spaces.
Easily fitted in minutes, even around corners.
Virtually indestructible and maintenance free.
Suitable for most domestic gutters.
Cost-effective.
