Available in 3 metre continuous lengths and in three diameters (100mm, 125mm and 150mm), Leafline is easy to install. Simply place one or more in your guttering; they even bend around corners. No special tools or training are required and it only takes a matter of minutes. The leafline gutter brush is virtually indestructible, made of stainless steel wire core with polypropylene bristles, so it will be years before you have to think about this problem again.
Features

Prevents leaves and debris build-up in guttering.
Stops birds and rodents entering loft spaces.
Easily fitted in minutes, even around corners.
Virtually indestructible and maintenance free.
Suitable for most domestic gutters.
Cost-effective.
product.variant_name: Lindab 150mm 3m Leafline Gutter Brush - Opaque

product.name: Lindab Square Steel Large Water Hopper
product.description: Brought to you by Lindab, this steel-painted large square water hopper is a traditional-style hopper for installations of the same aesthetic. Part of Lindab's rainwater systems range, this hopper is suitable for when a standing seam is installed on the roof. Manufactured using powder-coated galvanised steel with 0.6mm thickness, this hopper has been carefully developed to pair with pre-coated material. So there is no contrast in design when it comes to fitting full systems together. Moreover, by opting for steel, this is a lighter material than cast iron and easier to handle than aluminium. It also offers minimal thermal movement compared to plastic which is at risk of moving and cracking which can cause leaks. Features & Benefits: Lindab Square Steel Large Water Hopper Suitable for when a sanding seam is installed on a roofPowder-coated galvanised steel with 0.6mm thickness ensures no contracts in design when fitting full systemsLightweight for easy handling and transportationMinimal thermal movement with reduced risk of moving and crackingLow CO2 impact with tested and proven lowest cradle-to-grave impactHigh resistance to vandal attacksMinimal maintenance with an occasional wipe or wash down neededGuaranteed long service lifeCost-effective when compared to competing materialsSteel also has the lowest CO2 impact of competing materials. Tested and proven, the Rainline range of steel systems reflects the lowest cradle-to-grave impact. This is made possible by minimising the use of raw materials, components, energy, packaging and transport. The material is also highly resistant to attack from vandals and can be fixed flush to a wall; preventing anyone from climbing up the downpipe. With occasional maintenance being a wipe or wash down when the need arises. The installation itself is a smooth assembly, with a guaranteed long service life. The cost of materials being very effective when priced against leading plastic materials, aluminium and cast iron.

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Adjustable Downpipe Branch
product.description: This adjustable branch allows for downpipes to connect where there is only one outlet point available and can be used to merge a second pipe run into a pipe stack, positioned between 50° and 80°, connecting equal pipe diameters. Quick and easy to install, this downpipe branch is suitable for domestic or commercial buildings.Available in a range of diameters and colours to choose from to match your gutters and downpipes, this downpipe branch is made from high-performance steel and is lightweight, durable and long-lasting. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a protected steel core coated with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains, this branch has excellent flexibility and is corrosion and scratch resistant.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Adjustable Downpipe Branch Affordable and cost-effective  Ideal for large or small, contemporary or classic buildings  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Minimal maintenance needs  UV stabilised high-build polyester powder coating with resistance to discolouration  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Minimal environmental impact  Variety of diameters and colours to choose fromProtected and painted with extra-durable, high-build polyester coating, this downpipe branch has an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With low maintenance requirements, this branch is recommended to be cleaned annually and occasionally topped up with paint for any scratches.
product.variant_name: Lindab Steel Guttering Round Adjustable Branch 87mm Painted Tile Red

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Adjustable Downpipe Branch
product.description: This adjustable branch allows for downpipes to connect where there is only one outlet point available and can be used to merge a second pipe run into a pipe stack, positioned between 50° and 80°, connecting equal pipe diameters. Quick and easy to install, this downpipe branch is suitable for domestic or commercial buildings.Available in a range of diameters and colours to choose from to match your gutters and downpipes, this downpipe branch is made from high-performance steel and is lightweight, durable and long-lasting. Manufactured from galvanised steel with a protected steel core coated with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains, this branch has excellent flexibility and is corrosion and scratch resistant.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Adjustable Downpipe Branch Affordable and cost-effective  Ideal for large or small, contemporary or classic buildings  Resistant to vandalism and corrosion  Minimal maintenance needs  UV stabilised high-build polyester powder coating with resistance to discolouration  Long-lasting with minimal thermal movement  Minimal environmental impact  Variety of diameters and colours to choose fromProtected and painted with extra-durable, high-build polyester coating, this downpipe branch has an extended life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With low maintenance requirements, this branch is recommended to be cleaned annually and occasionally topped up with paint for any scratches.

product.name: Lindab Rectangular Steel Small Water Hopper

The zinc coating prevents rusting and corrosion, while the polymer grains reduce the risk of scratching and additional wear and tear. Manufactured by Lindab, it is a part of the Rainline collection.Rainline products are constructed of sturdy steel that is strategically galvanised and layered to deliver added protection. The zinc coating prevents rusting and corrosion, while the polymer grains reduce the risk of scratching and additional wear and tear. Less maintenance is required thanks to the polyester paint, which is UV stable, defensive, and easy to clean.Features & Benefits: Lindab Rectangular Steel Small Water Hopper Extensive colour selection  Numerous downpipe diameters to match your system  Perfect for domestic and commercial applications on modern builds, new or renovated  UV stabilised and resistant to damage  Affordable and can live up to 70 years  Simple installations  Minimised environmental influence.

product.name: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Connector
product.description: For builds that need a longer downpipe system, this painted Round downpipe connector from Lindab is perfect. It easily connects downpipes together in order to meet the required length and utilises a male/female connection. This Round downpipe connector is from the genius Rainline collection by Lindab. It is made from incredibly high-performing steel that is galvanised with zinc for added protection, as well as layered with polymer grains that make it hard to scratch and damage. Not only to create a popular colour choice but for giving further protection, the polyester paint is easy to wipe clean and ensures long-lasting use for around 70 years.Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel Downpipe Connector Pick from favourable colours  Several downpipe diameters to choose from  Less environmental impact  Paint is UV stabilised  Easy to handle and install  Cost-efficient  Prevents corrosion  Works in commercial and domestic applications  Galvanised steel that is durable and longevity  Lets pipe offcuts be used.

product.name: Lindab Round Steel One Piece Offset
product.description:
The steel painted round one-piece offset by Lindab is used to 'offset' a pipe stack, joining the gutter outlet or to traverse a plinth. Available with a fixed 100mm projection. Lindab’s round one-piece offset is smart and low-maintenance thanks to resilient, scratch-resistant polyester paint. It also comes with UV stability which means the colour can last for years to come. The Lindab one-piece offset is part of the popular Rainline™ range. Rainline is a sustainable range that has been tested and proven to offer the lowest carbon footprint rainwater system of any competitor. It is manufactured from 30% recycled material and is totally recyclable, meaning the environmental impact of steel is minor compared to plastic or other material. Manufacturing materials used in RainlineTM also means lasting solutions with systems being able to last up 70 years. 
Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel One Piece Offset SOKN one-piece offset with fixed 100mm projectionLow environmental impact over its lifetime than other metalsManufactured from 30% recycled material for easy recyclingUV stability helps minimise colour fadingLow maintenance saving time and costsHigh resistance to corrosion and vandalismCost-effective with a 15-year warranty as part of the Rainline™ painted systems range
Please note: 15-year warranty does not apply to unpainted finishes. Use of the Lindab steel painted one-piece offset in coastal regions where salt water is present is also not advised as it can risk a corrosive reaction. In this instance, a coated system should be used.

It is manufactured from 30% recycled material and is totally recyclable, meaning the environmental impact of steel is minor compared to plastic or other material. Manufacturing materials used in RainlineTM also means lasting solutions with systems being able to last up 70 years. 
Features & Benefits: Lindab Round Steel One Piece Offset SOKN one-piece offset with fixed 100mm projectionLow environmental impact over its lifetime than other metalsManufactured from 30% recycled material for easy recyclingUV stability helps minimise colour fadingLow maintenance saving time and costsHigh resistance to corrosion and vandalismCost-effective with a 15-year warranty as part of the Rainline™ painted systems range
Please note: 15-year warranty does not apply to unpainted finishes. Use of the Lindab steel painted one-piece offset in coastal regions where salt water is present is also not advised as it can risk a corrosive reaction. In this instance, a coated system should be used.
product.variant_name: Lindab 100mm Round One Piece Bend - Anthracite Grey

product.name: Lindab Magestic Rectangular Galvanised Steel Regular Water Hopper
product.description:
Lindab Magestic is an improved galvanised steel material for rainwater system and standing seam applications. Magestic offers the same trusted Lindab product designs with a strengthened magnesium zinc alloy coating.
Galvanised steel is already the most environmentally friendly material used in rainwater systems. Magestic has a reduced impact on zinc resources and less than 25% zinc run off into soils compared to hot dipped galvanised steel. New technology has allowed the material to be developed using magnesium to create a stable barrier to protect zinc’s porous structure against corrosion factors. Salt spray tests demonstrate the highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel. Magestic has more than twenty times the corrosion resistance of hot dipped galvanised steel. Unpainted metal gutters naturally weather organically adjusting to the installation environment. Magestic settles to an attractive dark grey metallic appearance within 3-5 years after installation.
Magestic corrosion in not influenced by the chlorine content of the environment. Natural exposure tests demonstrate more than three times the corrosion resistance of standard galvanisation in marine environments. Galvanised coatings migrate to repair red rust on cuts and scratches. Magnesium is more anodic than zinc making the sacrificial properties of Magestic more active than standard galvanisation.
Features

New elite, strengthed magnesium alloy coating
Highest surface protection of any metallic coated steel
Improved performance in coastal environments
Lowest price Lindab Rainwater System

Dimensions
Length: 250mm.Width: 150mm.Height: 150mm.
product.variant_name: Lindab Magestic 75mm Galvanised Steel Regular Water Hopper

product.name: Lindab 210mm Half Round Copper Rafter Bracket
product.description:
A limited range of Rainline products are available in uncoated copper. The finish is highly desirable and provides excellent corrosion resistance once it has transitioned to a greenish verdigris patina.
Rainline is ideal for modern and traditional buildings for both refurbishments and new build projects. Gutters and downpipes simply push together without the need for any special tools or sealants.
Low maintenance

The only maintenance required is an occasional wipe or wash down.

Vandal resistant

Highly resistant to attack from vandals - can be fixed flush to a wall to prevent anyone climbing up the downpipe.

Cost-effective solution

Competitively priced against leading plastic systems and inexpensive compared with aluminium and cast iron.

Quick and easy to install

Lindab's smart design solutions saves installation time for professionals and makes DIY installation easy. The pipes simply push together, snap mounting outlets, self-sealing stop ends, and click lock gutter joints and pipe brackets are just some of the unique product features of Lindab Rainline.
product.variant_name: Lindab 125mm Copper Rafter Bracket

product.name: Lindab Steel Downpipe Self Cleaning Leaf Trap
product.description:
Self cleaning leaf filter in HD polythene for down pipes.
When it comes to creating beautiful, environmentally friendly and maintenance free buildings, using the right materials is everything. The Lindab Rainline Steel Rainwater system uses the very best in lightweight galvanised steel to create a contemporary, cost effective and eco-friendly guttering system that won't shrink, split or leak and looks great too.
Each piece of core steel is coated with 275g zinc per square metre, a naturally self-healing coating that won't discolour or rust. The coating on both our High Build Polyester and Aluzinc guttering systems, are guaranteed for 15 years with a life expectancy in excess of 70 years.
Rainline is ideal for modern and traditional buildings for both refurbishments and new build projects. Gutters and downpipes simply push together without the need for any special tools or sealants.
The SLS fits directly into a 110mm Drain point, simply slides inside.
When you have a different diameter downpipe entering the SLS from above, you will need to purchase a BUTK drain shoe which allows for this connection to be achieved.
Properties

Steel is the ultimate material for roof-drainage systems.
It is much lighter than cast iron, is easier to handle than aluminium and offers minimal thermal movement compared to plastic (which can move and crack causing leaks).
Lindab's steel also has the lowest CO2 impact of any competitor.

Low maintenance

The only maintenance required is an occasional wipe or wash down.
Easy assembly and installation guarantee a long service life.

Vandal resistant

Highly resistant to attack from vandals - can be fixed flush to a wall to prevent anyone climbing up the downpipe

Minimum environmental impact

Tests have proven that Rainline steel systems reflect the lowest cradle-to-grave impact by minimizing the use of raw materials, components, energy, packaging and transport.

Cost-effective solution

Competitively priced against leading plastic systems and inexpensive compared with aluminium and cast iron.
product.variant_name: Lindab 100mm HD Polythene Self Cleaning Steel Leaf Trap

Lindab's steel also has the lowest CO2 impact of any competitor.

Low maintenance

The only maintenance required is an occasional wipe or wash down.
Easy assembly and installation guarantee a long service life.

Vandal resistant

Highly resistant to attack from vandals - can be fixed flush to a wall to prevent anyone climbing up the downpipe

Minimum environmental impact

Tests have proven that Rainline steel systems reflect the lowest cradle-to-grave impact by minimizing the use of raw materials, components, energy, packaging and transport.

Cost-effective solution

Competitively priced against leading plastic systems and inexpensive compared with aluminium and cast iron.

product.name: Lindab Steel Guttering Touch Up Paint
product.description:
The Lindab steel guttering and downpipe touch up paint comes in either 12ml or 250ml.
The 12ml touch up paint is used to fix small scratches or to cover up cut ends, with applicator brush.
The 250ml touch up paint is used to cover up larger areas.

product.description: Cost-effective, low maintenance and suited to both new and refurbished builds, this Half Round guttering from Lindab is available in various colours and sizes to match your rainwater systems. Manufactured from lightweight galvanised steel, this guttering is resilient, easy to install and looks very visually appealing.Ideal for both contemporary and traditional aesthetics, Rainline guttering is highly versatile and constantly pleases the eye. The steel structures are coated with zinc (275g per m²) for resistance against rusting and discolouration. It carries self-healing properties to ensure long-term use for a product that won't split, leak or shrink due to low thermal movement.Features & Benefits: Lindab Half Round Steel GutterLess CO² than other competitorsMinimal maintenance with occasional washesLong-lasting and guaranteed for 15 years with a life expectancy in excess of 70 yearsVandal resistant with the ability to fix against the wallLow environmental impactCost-effective Rainline products easily push together for seamless installation process. There is no need to waste time finding tools and sealants.

product.name: Lindab Half Round Copper Outlet
product.description:
A limited range of Rainline products are available in uncoated copper. The finish is highly desirable and provides excellent corrosion resistance once it has transitioned to a greenish verdigris patina.
Rainline is ideal for modern and traditional buildings for both refurbishments and new build projects. Gutters and downpipes simply push together without the need for any special tools or sealants.
Low maintenance

The only maintenance required is an occasional wipe or wash down.

Vandal resistant

Highly resistant to attack from vandals - can be fixed flush to a wall to prevent anyone climbing up the downpipe.

Cost-effective solution

Competitively priced against leading plastic systems and inexpensive compared with aluminium and cast iron.

Quick and easy to install

Lindab's smart design solutions saves installation time for professionals and makes DIY installation easy. The pipes simply push together, snap mounting outlets, self-sealing stop ends, and click lock gutter joints and pipe brackets are just some of the unique product features of Lindab Rainline.

product.name: Lindab Airy AIRYB Vent Valve (Body Only)
product.description: Designed for wall or ceiling installation in new-builds or as an upgrade replacement, the Airy AIRYB Vent Valve by Lindab helps improve your indoor climate. It features a smart grip function which ensures easy installation, plus unique sound performance that ensures optimum sound level. The valve consists of two parts, the valve body (AIRYB) and the flat front plate (AIRYFP - sold separately). It's a slim, effective air valve with unlimited applications and has the lowest sound power level on the market. To install, fix the valve body to the duct system or a valve socket via flexible spring wings. The front plate is then attached to the valve body via springs. In addition to their design, size variations are available to ensure you have the right one for your project requirements. Features & Benefits: Lindab Airy AIRYB Vent Valve (Body Only)Simple grip fastening suitable for wall and ceiling mountingSnap-on/off front (sold separately)Suitable for supply and exhaust airCan be fitted in existing systemsCan be fitted to male or female connectionsExtends only 5 - 25 mm from the wallPlease note: Special colours are available on request.Stainless steel front plate options available (sold separately).It is possible to paint the front plate with standard wall paint or to cover it with wallpaper.
product.variant_name: Room Ventilation Valve Lindab Airy Body - 100mm

product.name: Lindab 140mm Rectangular Steel Gutter
product.description: This traditional rectangular gutter has a box profile and a rounded bead front lip detail for a faster and easier installation, simple to install with Lindab click-lock gutter joints or a traditional craft method. Made of pre-coated galvanised steel with a 0.6mm thickness, this high-quality gutter ensures a long-life installation.Available in a range of colours to perfectly match your gutter system, this gutter is ideal for a variety of applications including small or large, classic or contemporary buildings. Made from superior steel, this gutter is long-lasting, robust and lightweight. This galvanised steel gutter is protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains providing corrosion resistance, scratch resistance and excellent flexibility.Features & Benefits: Lindab 140mm Rectangular Steel Gutter Low maintenance requirements  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  UV stable and resistant to discolouring with a high-build polyester powder coating  Minimal environmental impact  Cost-effective and affordable  Suitable for domestic or commercial buildings  Variety of colours available to choose from  Long-life with minimal thermal movementThe extra-durable high-build polyester powder coating protects this gutter extending its life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With minimal maintenance requirements, this gutter needs the occasional touch-up with paint for any scratches and is recommended to be cleaned yearly to ensure long service life. Fully UV stabilised, this gutter is resistant to discolouration.
product.variant_name: Lindab 140mm Rectangular Gutter - Black

Made from superior steel, this gutter is long-lasting, robust and lightweight. This galvanised steel gutter is protected with a thick layer of 275g per square metre of zinc and a top coating of coloured polymer grains providing corrosion resistance, scratch resistance and excellent flexibility.Features & Benefits: Lindab 140mm Rectangular Steel Gutter Low maintenance requirements  Resistant to corrosion and vandalism  UV stable and resistant to discolouring with a high-build polyester powder coating  Minimal environmental impact  Cost-effective and affordable  Suitable for domestic or commercial buildings  Variety of colours available to choose from  Long-life with minimal thermal movementThe extra-durable high-build polyester powder coating protects this gutter extending its life expectancy to an excess of 7NULL years. With minimal maintenance requirements, this gutter needs the occasional touch-up with paint for any scratches and is recommended to be cleaned yearly to ensure long service life. Fully UV stabilised, this gutter is resistant to discolouration.

product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Ring Seal
product.description: Serving as a crucial component in your drainage system, this JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Ring Seal is designed to ensure a watertight and secure connection between Twinwall drain pipes when used with Twinwall couplers. Made from durable rubber construction, it is available in a range of diameters to fit your installation requirements.Crafted from lightweight yet durable HDPE plastic, the Twinwall drainage pipes come in a range of sizes from 100mm to an impressive 3000mm in diameter. Designed through a cutting-edge twin extrusion process, where two layers are expertly extruded and fused seamlessly, they boast superior construction. The outer layer showcases a robust corrugated design, enhancing structural strength and minimising the risk of on-site damage. The inner wall boasts a sleek, seamless finish that facilitates smooth hydraulic flow, a stark contrast to traditional single-wall pipes prone to silt accumulation.Features & Benefits: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Ring SealAvailable in a range of diametersEnsures a watertight and secure connectionFor use with JFC Twinwall Couplers and Drain PipesResistant to naturally occurring chemicalsVersatile installation depths, ranging from 0.5 to 10 metresCost-effective due to reduced plant and labour requirementsMinimal waste compared to conventional pipesLightweight and easy to installThanks to the longer 6-metre sections, the Twinwall pipes ensure a swift installation process, reducing the need for numerous joints. With straightforward cutting, they are easily customisable on-site. There is also a comprehensive range of bends, angles and junctions available to suit any project.Standards & CertificationBBA and HAPAS Roads and Bridges Agrément: Certificate No. 02/H069Please note: When using a Twinwall coupler, two ring seals are required.

product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe for Surface Water Drainage - 6000mm
product.description: Available in a range of diameters and with or without perforations to suit your installation needs, this JFC CorriPipe™ offers the perfect solution for effective surface drainage. Manufactured from high-density polyethylene (HDPE) plastic, this Twinwall Drainage Pipe is a product of precision manufacturing.Through a cutting-edge twin extrusion process, two layers seamlessly intertwine and are heat welded together in a single continuous step, ensuring durability and reliability. The outer layer boasts a corrugated design, enhancing its structural integrity and reducing the risk of on-site damage. Meanwhile, the inner wall features a smooth, seamless finish that optimises hydraulic flow, eliminating the headache of silt accumulation that plagues traditional single-wall pipes.Features & Benefits: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe for Surface Water Drainage - 6000mmFor surface water drainageManufactured from high-density polyethylene (HDPE) plasticInnovative twin extrusion process ensure durabilityCorrugated outer wall for added structural strengthSmooth inner wall for optimal hydraulic flow and no silt buildupLightweight with a generous 6-metre length for easy installationReduces labour and plant costs with fewer jointsResistant to a wide range of naturally occurring chemicalsSuitable for various soil conditions (depths from 0.5 to 10 metres*)Thanks to its lightweight construction and generous length of 6 metres, this product facilitates a swift and hassle-free installation process. This not only saves you time but also minimises labour and plant costs due to fewer required joints. Plus, its resistance to a wide range of naturally occurring chemicals makes it suitable for various soil conditions. A full range of fittings and accessories are also readily available to complete your drainage system.Please note: *The maximum cover depths for CorriPipe™ are typically between 6 and 10 metres when installed in accordance with series 500 of the MCDHW Volume 1 as detailed in the CorriPipe™ BBA certificate.
product.variant_name: JFC Twinwall Unperforated Drain Pipe for Surface Water Drainage - 150mm x 6000mm

product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Coupler for Surface Water Drainage
product.description: Ideal for surface water drainage, this JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Coupler is a fantastic asset to the JFC CorriPipe™, which it is supplied with as standard. This HDPE double socket Twinwall coupler comes in a range of diameters, letting you join an assortment of Twinwall pipes together with ease.If installed alongside two sealing rings, you can use this coupler to obtain a watertight system.Features & Benefits: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Coupler for Surface Water DrainageIdeal for surface water drainageA fantastic asset to the JFC CorriPipe™Comes in a range of diametersAllows the joining of Twinwall pipesFast and efficient optionCorriPipe™ fittings and accessories provide you with a fast and efficient option. product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Y Unequal Branch for Surface Water Drainage
product.description: Designed to create a branch from a surface water drainage main line at a 45° angle, JFC Manufacturing's Twinwall drain pipe Y unequal branch is a triple socket section manufactured from HDPE plastic. Manufactured by a twin extrusion process, which means having two layers simultaneously extruded, a strong and durable structure is assured. The process is performed once inside and the other heat welded together in a continuous process. The outer wall is also corrugated for exceptional strength, reducing the potential for on-site damage to occur. As opposed to the inner wall which is smooth with a seamless finish to assist hydraulic flow. Better yet, the modern design means that unlike traditional single-wall pipes it will prevent slit accumulation. Features & Benefits: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Y Unequal Branch for Surface Water DrainageLightweight for easy handling and transportation on-siteCan be installed at depths from 0.5 to 10 metresTwin walled and corrugated for strong structureSmooth inner wall supports increased flow capacityCan be combined with a full range of bends of all angles and both equal and unequal junctions are also availableResistant to naturally occurring chemicalsPlant and labour cost reductionEliminates waste compared to traditional pipesEasy to cut to length if requiredThe branch complies with HAPAS Roads and Bridges Agrément Certificate No. 02/H069, is BBA approved and, if installed correctly with three sealing rings, a watertight system is achievable. If it is too long, you can also cut the branch as needed to fit accordingly. Please note: Suitable for surface water drainage only.
product.variant_name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Y Unequal Branch for Surface Water Drainage - 150mm to 225mm

product.name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe Surface Water Drainage Double Socket Bend
product.description:
HDPE double socket twinwall bends. For use with twinwall pipe to create a rigid bends. If installed with 2 sealing rings a watertight system can be achieved.
For surface water applications only. Complies with HAPAS BBA.
Twin Wall drainage pipe is made from HDPE plastic and is available from 100mm to 3000mm diameters. Manufactured by a twin extrusion process in which two layers are simultaneously extruded, one inside the other and heat welded together in one continuous process. The outer wall is corrugated providing excellent structural strength which reduces the possibility of on-site damage. The inner wall has a smooth seamless finish to assist hydraulic flow. This design, unlike traditional single-wall pipe prevents silt accumulation.
Benefits of Twin Wall include:

Lightweight 6 metre long lengths
Strong (Twin Walled & corrugated)
Smooth inner wall for increased flow capacity
Resistant to naturally occuring chemicals
Can be installed at depths from 0.5 to 10 metres
BBA and HAPAS Roads & Bridges Agrément Certificate No. 02/H069
Reduced plant & labour costs
Faster installation as 6 metre lengths mean fewer joints
Elimination of waste compared to traditional pipe
Pipe is easily cut to size requirements on site
A full range of bends of all angles & both equal & unequal junctions are also available
product.variant_name: JFC Twinwall Drain Pipe 15 Degree Double Socket Bend - 150mm

Lightweight 6 metre long lengths
Strong (Twin Walled & corrugated)
Smooth inner wall for increased flow capacity
Resistant to naturally occuring chemicals
Can be installed at depths from 0.5 to 10 metres
BBA and HAPAS Roads & Bridges Agrément Certificate No. 02/H069
Reduced plant & labour costs
Faster installation as 6 metre lengths mean fewer joints
Elimination of waste compared to traditional pipe
Pipe is easily cut to size requirements on site
A full range of bends of all angles & both equal & unequal junctions are also available

product.name: Graf One2Clean Plus Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
The One2Clean Plus sewage treatment plant from Graf will treat the water, so that it is clean enough to be discharged into a water course (depending on how frequently it is being used and the manufacturer’s guidelines). However, One2Clean Plus sewage treatment plants do require a power source and requires emptying approximately every year.
The water discharged from the One2Clean Plus packaged treatment plant must meet the relevant British Standard which is BS EN 12566 for small sewage treatment plants and BS 6297:2007 for drainage fields.
Graf One2Clean Plus Sewage Treatment Plant Process

Untreated waste enters the One2Clean tank via the inlet on the side.
Wastewater then falls directly into the biological zone where the treatment takes place, allowing micro-organisms to start the breakdown process.
Compressed air is used initially for aeration through the diffuser, intermittent to achieve the best treatment performance.
Aeration is then stopped allowing the activated waste to sink to the bottom.
Compressed air is sent through the One2Clean tank once again, extracting the cleaned water near the surface.
This water passes through a sampling point before leaving the plant, where samples can be taken to confirm the quality of effluent.
The above process occurs twice per day, each lasting 12 hours.
The sludge which builds up at the bottom of the tank must also be emptied in line with the manufacturer’s instructions
Numerous companiescan dispose of the waste, these must be a registered waste carrier

Features & Benefits

One tank with just one chamber
Less energy consumption
No mechanical elements in the wastewater
No pumps in the wastewater
No electrical components in the wastewater
Incredibly low volume of sewage sludge
Odourless, clear treated water for extraction
State-of-the-art manufacturing for maximum stability
100% watertight and corrosion-resistant
Can be installed in groundwater
Simple maintenance via an integrated, self-cleaning sampling container
More advanced control panel than the standard One2Clean
Control panel allows additional plug in retro fitting of add on systems
product.variant_name: Graf One2Clean Xtra Sewage Treatment Plant 5 Person with Pedestrian Lid

product.name: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester Package
product.description: The Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester Package is available in various sizes for efficient rainwater harvesting. Whether for residential or commercial use, this system is designed to collect rainwater from building roofs, providing a cost-effective and eco-friendly water source for applications such as WCs, washing machines, irrigation, and outdoor cleaning.Choose between an A15 lid suitable for pedestrian areas or a B125 cast iron lid designed for light vehicular use, tailoring the system to your specific needs. The Graf Carat Direct system incorporates an innovative filtration process that varies based on the roof's surface area, preventing leaves, moss, and debris from entering the storage tank and ensuring the purity of the collected rainwater.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester PackageOffers efficient, cost-effective and eco-friendly rainwater harvesting in various sizesFor residential and commercial applicationsChoose between A15 or B125 lids to suit pedestrian or light vehicular areasInnovative filtration prevents debris from entering the tankProvides water for applications such as WCs, washing machines, irrigation, and outdoor cleaningReliability is enhanced with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted serviceLightweight, easy to transport and safe assemblyEPDM to profile sealings lasts more than 25 yearsOnce securely stored in the tank, rainwater is easily extracted. Above-ground tanks feature a simple tap for convenient access, like a standard water butt, while underground tanks utilise pumps tailored to different applications. To enhance reliability, the Graf Carat Direct system can be equipped with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted service during periods of limited rainwater collection. Supplied with a mains water top-up unit measure the level of water in the underground tank.
product.variant_name: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester Package 2700L with Pedestrian Lid

The Graf Carat Direct system incorporates an innovative filtration process that varies based on the roof's surface area, preventing leaves, moss, and debris from entering the storage tank and ensuring the purity of the collected rainwater.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester PackageOffers efficient, cost-effective and eco-friendly rainwater harvesting in various sizesFor residential and commercial applicationsChoose between A15 or B125 lids to suit pedestrian or light vehicular areasInnovative filtration prevents debris from entering the tankProvides water for applications such as WCs, washing machines, irrigation, and outdoor cleaningReliability is enhanced with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted serviceLightweight, easy to transport and safe assemblyEPDM to profile sealings lasts more than 25 yearsOnce securely stored in the tank, rainwater is easily extracted. Above-ground tanks feature a simple tap for convenient access, like a standard water butt, while underground tanks utilise pumps tailored to different applications. To enhance reliability, the Graf Carat Direct system can be equipped with a mains water backup function, ensuring uninterrupted service during periods of limited rainwater collection. Supplied with a mains water top-up unit measure the level of water in the underground tank.
product.variant_name: Graf Carat Direct Rainwater Harvester Package 4800L with Cast Iron Lid

product.name: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester Package
product.description: Designed for outdoor cleaning and irrigation purposes, the Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvesting system by Graf is ideal for collecting rainwater from the roof of your property and then feeding it into the underground tank via the downpipes. Available in various sizes, you can use the harvester for domestic or commercial use with the choice of either an A15 lid for pedestrian use or a B125 cast iron lid for light vehicular use.Before entering the underground tank, the water passes through a filter to remove debris, ensuring clear water for use. An underground pressure-sensitive pump is also installed. When a valve or tap is opened, the water is pumped under pressure until the valve is closed allowing the system to re-pressurise and turn off the power to the pump.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester PackageLightweight for easy handling and transportationEasy and safe to assembleA15 and B125 lid options and choice of harvester sizes availableEPDM used to profile sealings and ensure minimum life of 25 yearsConstant monitoring of production ensures consistent qualitySuitable for vehicle loading when a telescopic cast iron cover is usedTwo additional hose-lock connection extraction pointsFilter prevents leaves, moss and debris from travelling with the rainwater out of the tankFilter package 2 consists of an internal Universal Filter 3, an inflow stilling system for controlling the water inflow as well as a Spannfix connection sleeve, Rodent Guard and an Overflow siphon. The Integra Inox Submersible pump features an automatic start/stop function with a floating water extraction unit and protection against dry running.Please note: If you have an above-ground tank, you can use a pump to extract the rainwater. However, if the tank is underground, you'll need a pump to extract the rainwater. It's important to consider what you'll be using the harvested rainwater for, as this will determine whether you need a backup function for periods where little rainwater is collected.
product.variant_name: Graf Carat Garden Comfort Rainwater Harvester Package 2700L with Pedestrian Lid

product.name: Graf Klaro E Professional Sewage Treatment Plant
product.description:
Klaro E Professional sewage treatment plants by Graf are always a good choice. They are flexibly adapted to meet the stricter discharge values in water protection areas. No live parts need to be installed in the Klaro E Professional. Movement processes are created by three air lift pumps that are operated using a compressor which is built into the control.
The Graf Klaro E Professional wastewater treatment system does not need consistent integration of live technology in the tank. Klaro E Professional sewage treatment plant can be flexibly adjusted to changing conditions by altering the cycle times. The air pressure holes are colour coded to avoid installation errors; the whole system just needs to be fitted to the baffle of the reservoir.
Graf Klaro E Professional Sewage Treatment Plant Features & Benefits

No live technology in the reservoir
Air compressor is very durable and whisper-quiet
Flexible, as expandable
Can be switched to holiday mode
Easy to install
Low maintenance
10-year warranty on sewage reservoirs
2-year warranty on technology
product.variant_name: Graf One Advanced Sewage Treatment Plant 10 Person with Pedestrian Lid

product.name: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Cast Iron Lid
product.description: Graf Carat septic tanks extract floating and removable material domestic wastewater. This is pure mechanical cleaning, for which you need 500 ltrs of capacity per inhabitant. If you assume a volume of 150 ltrs, the wastewater passes through the system in 3 days.These septic tanks must have a total volume of at least 2000 ltrs. A 2000 ltr system is sufficient for 4 inhabitants, another 500 ltrs, must be incorporated for each additional inhabitant.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Cast Iron LidLow weight: can also be installed in difficult local conditions without a craneLow maintenance: maintenance or cleaning work can be performed through the shaftsTanks can be used as rainwater harvesting systems after thorough cleaningPlease note: This tank will be delivered fully assembled.
product.variant_name: Graf Carat 2700L Septic Tank 4 Person with Cast Iron Lid

product.name: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Cast Iron Lid
product.description: Graf Carat septic tanks extract floating and removable material domestic wastewater. This is pure mechanical cleaning, for which you need 500 ltrs of capacity per inhabitant. If you assume a volume of 150 ltrs, the wastewater passes through the system in 3 days.These septic tanks must have a total volume of at least 2000 ltrs. A 2000 ltr system is sufficient for 4 inhabitants, another 500 ltrs, must be incorporated for each additional inhabitant.Features & Benefits: Graf Carat Septic Tank with Cast Iron LidLow weight: can also be installed in difficult local conditions without a craneLow maintenance: maintenance or cleaning work can be performed through the shaftsTanks can be used as rainwater harvesting systems after thorough cleaningPlease note: This tank will be delivered fully assembled.

product.name: Graf Platin Garden-Comfort Rainwater Harvesting Tank Low Profile
product.description: The Graf Platin Garden-Comfort Low Profile Rainwater Harvesting Tank is a specially developed solution designed for efficient rainwater harvesting. Available in sizes ranging from 1500 to 7500 litres, this tank offers versatility to suit various needs.Featuring an integrated filter, the tank ensures water purity, and its minimum installation depth translates to a quick and cost-effective installation process. The low weight of the tank makes it easy to transport, and its groundwater stability up to the tank shoulder adds durability.Features & Benefits: Graf Platin Garden-Comfort Rainwater Harvesting Tank Low Profile Sizes range from 1500 to 7500 litres, offering versatile options for various needsDesigned for efficient rainwater collection, with a quick and cost-effective installation process due to minimum depthIntegrated filter ensures water purityLightweight design for easy transport15-year warrantyWith the option of combining it with a cast iron telescope, the Platin tank becomes drivable by cars, enhancing its adaptability. Filter package 2 includes an internal Universal Filter 3, inflow stilling system, Spannfix connection sleeve, Rodent Guard, and Overflow siphon for comprehensive water management.Equipped with the Integra Inox Submersible pump, the tank boasts an automatic start/stop function, a floating water extraction unit, and protection against dry running. Additionally, enjoy peace of mind with a 15-year warranty, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliability. Kit Contents1 x Platin Tank1 x Telescopic Mini PE Lid, Pedestrian loading, Green1 x Overflow Siphon1 x Internal Universal Filter 3, Inflow Stilling System1 x Spannfix Connection Sleeve1 x Water Hose Connection Box1 x Intergra Submersible Pump1 x 10m Roll of pressure hose1 x Rodent Guard

product.name: Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe
product.description: This Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe is part of a sturdy and flexible dry-jointed pipework system that is easy to install and suited to various applications. It is lightweight yet durable, making it resistant to accidental external damage and vandalism, and eco-friendly with a recyclable cast iron structure.With a choice of ductile or stainless steel couplings, the complete soil and waste pipework system covers installation from pipework connection to stack to underground sewer connection. It is compatible with rainwater installations alongside Harmer Roof Outlets with pipes in lengths of 3m and diameters ranging from 50mm to 400mm. You can construct your system using the twin screw couplings. Socketless fixing between pipe and fittings is easy but secure without special installation equipment.Features & Benefits: Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain PipeLightweight but strong cast ironHigh tensile strengthEasily assembled with socketless fixingResilient primer and epoxy coatings for low maintenanceRecyclable after useSystem suited to various applicationsThe pipes and fittings from this system are crafted from grey iron to DIN 1691 (exceeds BS 1452 Grade 150 ISO 185 Grade 15), while the couplings feature stainless steel and ductile cast iron constructions. The pipes are coated with a primer (minimum thickness of 40 µm) on their exteriors and an epoxy coating (minimum thickness of 120 µm) on their interiors. Fittings, however, are coated both externally and internally with an epoxy coating (minimum thickness 60 µm). These epoxy coatings mean that pipes and fittings will only require minimal maintenance during their service life.High in tensile strength and non-combustible to prevent the need for fire protection collars, Harmer SML stands as a cutting-edge cast iron technology, with BBA certification, full compliance with BS EN 877, Kitemark certification, and CE Mark conformity.Standards & CertificationMeets British and European Standards: BS EN 877 and BS EN 14366; 2004 for excellent noise attenuationCertification: BBA Agrément certifiedCE Mark: European product conformity to harmonised standard BS EN 877 in accordance with Construction Products Regulation 2013Kitemark Certification: in accordance with BS EN877

product.name: Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe Iron Coupling
product.description: Perfect for forming sturdy connections between pipework, this Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe Iron Coupling is easy to install. With a durable structure, it seamlessly joins into the dry-jointed pipework system, where recyclable cast iron structures withstand accidental external damage and vandalism.System assembly is effortless with ductile and stainless steel twin screw couplings and socketless fixing between pipes and fittings, which create secure connections without specialised installation equipment. The complete soil and waste pipework system provides 3m long pipes and diameters ranging from 50mm to 400mm, suiting a range of installations from pipework connections to stack to underground sewer connections. The system is also ideal for rainwater installations when paired with Harmer Roof Outlets.Features & Benefits: Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe Iron CouplingCreates secure connections between pipeworkDurable and lightweight structureInstallation is easyResilient epoxy coatings permit low maintenanceSystem is ideal across different installationsEliminates need for special installation equipmentCouplings consist of stainless steel and ductile cast iron structures. Manufactured using grey iron, pipes and fittings are made to meet DIN 1691 standards (surpassing BS 1452 Grade 150 ISO 185 Grade 15) with exteriors coated in primer (with a minimum thickness of 40 µm) and interiors lined with epoxy coating (with a minimum thickness of 120 µm). Fittings are coated with epoxy (minimum thickness of 60 µm), both internally and externally, and these coatings reduce maintenance needs during use for a low-effort, easily maintained option.At the leading edge of cast iron technology, Harmer SML includes Kitemark and BBA certification, full compliance with BS EN 877 standards, CE Mark conformity. product.name: Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe Coupling
product.description: Crafted from stainless steel for durability, this Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe Coupling is easy to install alongside cast iron pipework. It seamlessly incorporates into the dry-jointed pipework system, which is designed to resist accidental external damage and vandalism across several applications. Constructing your system becomes effortless with the twin screw coupling, ensuring secure connections.Alongside the ductile and stainless steel couplings, this comprehensive soil and waste pipework system is formed with socketless fixing between pipe and fittings without the burden of special installation equipment. It caters to almost every aspect of installation, spanning from pipework connections to stack to underground sewer connections. Ideal for rainwater installations when paired with Harmer Roof Outlets, the system features 3m long pipes and diameters ranging from 50mm to 400mm.Features & Benefits: Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe CouplingAllows for secure connectionsFor use with the cast iron pipeworkStainless steel structure for durabilityEasy to install with lightweight structureResilient epoxy coatings permit low maintenanceSystem is versatile across applicationsNo need for special installation equipment Pipes and fittings are meticulously crafted from grey iron, adhering to DIN 1691 standards (exceeding BS 1452 Grade 150 ISO 185 Grade 15), while couplings include stainless steel and ductile cast iron constructions. Primer coatings (minimum thickness of 40 µm) adorn pipe exteriors, complemented by an epoxy coating (minimum thickness of 120 µm) on their interiors. In contrast, fittings are coated both externally and internally with an epoxy layer (minimum thickness of 60 µm) for less maintenance throughout their service life.Harmer SML is at the leading edge of cast iron technology, boasting BBA and Kitemark certification, full compliance with BS EN 877 standards, and CE Mark conformity. The system is non-combustible without the need for fire protection collars and exhibits high tensile strength. product.name: Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe Rest Bend
product.description: This Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe Rest Bend coordinates seamlessly with the rest of the Harmer SML dry-jointed pipework system, forming a long-lasting, lightweight and durable cast iron solution. With an innate resistance to accidental external damage and vandalism, the cast iron components can be recycled, making for a sustainable choice.Pipes are equipped with epoxy-coated interiors (minimum 120 µm thickness) and exteriors lined in primer (minimum thickness of 40 µm) whereas fittings are coated with epoxy both on the inside and outside (minimum thickness of 60 µm), working to limit the maintenance needs once installed. Both pipes and fittings are made from grey iron to DIN 1691 (exceeding BS 1452 Grade 150 and ISO 185 Grade 15).Features & Benefits: Harmer SML Cast Iron Underground Drain Pipe Rest BendCrafted from cast iron for strength, durability and recyclabilityHigh tensile strengthFor purchase in various pipe diametersLightweight for easy handling and installationNo special equipment needed due to socketless fixingFeatures a primed exterior and resilient epoxy interiorSystem is suited to a range of installationsHarmer SML creates reliable, secure connections without specialist installation equipment due to the socketless fixing of pipes and fittings. The twin screw couplings also allow quick assembly, made from stainless steel and ductile cast iron. Complete soil and waste pipework systems are compatible with various installations, from pipework connections to stack to underground sewer connections, and rainwater installations with the use of Harmer Roof Outlets. Pipes are available in 3m lengths and diameters between 50mm and 400mm.Harmer SML is at the leading edge of cast iron technology. It is BBA and Kitemark certified, adhering to CE Mark and BS EN 877 standards. Non-combustible, the system offers high tensile strength and negates the use of fire protection collars.Standards & CertificationMeets British and European Standards: BS EN 877 and BS EN 14366; 2004 for excellent noise attenuationCertification: BBA Agrément certifiedCE Mark: European product conformity to harmonised standard BS EN 877 in accordance with Construction Products Regulation 2013Kitemark Certification: in accordance with BS EN877
